description.short: Research-driven plan enhancement with 4 parallel research sub-agents
description.full: Spawns 4 parallel research sub-agents to gather context before complex tasks: framework_docs_researcher (uses Context7), learnings_researcher (queries Duro memory), best_practices_researcher (external sources), codebase_analyzer (patterns and history). Front-loads research to make execution more accurate.

researchers.name: framework_docs_researcher
researchers.description: Fetch current framework documentation via Context7 or web search

researchers.name: learnings_researcher
researchers.description: Search past facts, decisions, and incidents from Duro memory

researchers.name: best_practices_researcher
researchers.description: Gather external best practices for the task type

researchers.name: codebase_analyzer
researchers.description: Analyze existing code patterns and recent changes

outputs.report: Consolidated research report with categorized findings
